---
title: ""
---

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
![](images/Marty_Marquis_headshot.jpg){.profile-image}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-8}
## About Marty

A cartographer and spatial analyst based in Cascadia, Marty currently serves on the City Council in Scappoose, Oregon. Founding member of the band Blitzen Trapper, he toured extensively in North America and Europe for a dozen years and was inducted in the Oregon Music Hall of Fame in 2024.


## Skills or areas of interest

- Add an area of expertise
- Add a tool, method, or topic
- Add another interest

## Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/YOUR-USERNAME)
- [Organization or professional profile](https://example.org)
- [Email or contact page](https://example.org/contact)
:::
:::
